caption: The video features an individual standing at a podium, delivering a speech. The person is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and vest, and has a white beard. They are positioned in front of a decorative wall with a geometric pattern and a vase containing red flowers to the right. As the individual speaks, they use hand gestures for emphasis, placing their right hand on their chest at one point. The setting appears formal, likely a conference or official event, given the presence of microphones and the structured backdrop. The atmosphere suggests a significant address or announcement being made.
